business.name: Condos and Castles Realty Inc.
business.tagline: King West's Original Boutique Brokerage since 1999

team.name: Alexandra Raszewska
team.role: In-house Lawyer, J.D. Barrister and Solicitor

team.name: Ella Raszewska
team.role: Chief Financial and Administration Officer / VP

testimonials.text: His extensive knowledge of the downtown condo market makes them a natural choice when if you are thinking of selling your home.
testimonials.author: Bob Kamino

testimonials.text: The customer service from Paul and his team was unparalleled. We were always in contact about different issues.
testimonials.author: Stuart Horn

testimonials.text: Our experience with Paul from Condos and Castles was extremely positive. During the process of buying our new house, and the sale our condo we felt that Paul always had our best interests at heart.
testimonials.author: James Davidson and Fran Bianchi

testimonials.text: Condos and Castles was recommended to us by friends when we were moving to Toronto. I was so happy with the very knowledgeable and patient service.
testimonials.author: Jennie Rubio

testimonials.text: Paul's uniquely hands on, low pressure approach was a breath of fresh air when compared to the higher pressure buying and selling tactics we have experienced with other agents.
testimonials.author: Brock Tully

unique_selling_points: Original boutique brokerage in King West since 1999
Family tradition of land ownership since 1402
One of Toronto's greenest brokerages - LED lighting, 100% recycling, first brokerage with electric car

website_tech.fonts: Georgia, Times New Roman, Times, serif
website_tech.observations: Extremely outdated WordPress 2.6 (circa 2008). No HTTPS. No responsive design. IE6/IE7 CSS hacks still present. Skype integration. Table-based layouts. 885px fixed width.
